top_signals.title: Former Tether CIO seeks to sell stake in stablecoin issuer, Bloomberg reports
top_signals.summary: The reported transaction comes as Tether maintains it has no plans to go public, even as other crypto companies pursue or delay IPOs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: From Macron to Modi, governments are rolling out the red carpet for AI giants
top_signals.summary: Macron and Modi are courting tech CEOs as France and India seek AI data center investment and cloud infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Op-Ed: The copper the world needs is already above ground
top_signals.summary: Copper tailings processing offers a faster, cleaner way to help close the global copper supply gap as electrification and AI drive demand.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
